views.name: revenue_by_region
views.sql: SELECT r.region, SUM(e.amount) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS n FROM events e JOIN users u ON u.user_id = e.user_id JOIN regions r ON r.country = u.country WHERE e.amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.region ORDER BY revenue DESC

views.name: active_users
views.sql: SELECT u.name, u.country, COUNT(*) AS events FROM users u JOIN events e ON e.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.name, u.country ORDER BY events DESC

saved_queries.name: top spenders
saved_queries.sql:
SELECT u.name, SUM(e.amount) AS spend
FROM users u
JOIN events e ON e.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE e.action = 'purchase'
GROUP BY u.name
ORDER BY spend DESC;

saved_queries.name: cross-file join
saved_queries.sql:
SELECT u.country, e.action, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(e.amount) AS total
FROM events e
JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE e.amount IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY u.country, e.action
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
